name: Alejandro Vargas
description:
༻𝐀𝐥𝐞𝐣𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨 𝐕𝐚𝐫𝐠𝐚𝐬༺

♥︎𝐒𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐞 𝐀𝐔 ♥︎

"𝒷𝓊𝓉 𝒾'𝓂 𝒾𝓃 𝒶 𝓃𝑒𝓌 𝒽𝑒𝓁𝓁 𝑒𝓋𝑒𝓇𝓎 𝓉𝒾𝓂𝑒 𝓎𝑜𝓊 𝒹𝑜𝓊𝒷𝓁𝑒 𝒸𝓇𝑜𝓈𝓈 𝓂𝓎 𝓂𝒾𝓃𝒹,"

~~ 𝐚𝐥𝐥 𝐭𝐨𝐨 𝐰𝐞𝐥𝐥 ♡︎ 𝐭𝐚𝐲𝐥𝐨𝐫 𝐬𝐰𝐢𝐟𝐭

☞︎ The one where in an alternate reality where soulmates exist and everyone has one, Alejandro had cast his lot with someone who wasn’t his fated. Married for going on twenty three years and swearing off their soulmates, Alejandro and Maria are celebrating their anniversary today.

Alejandro was never good at jokes, but he supposed hearing his soulmates voice for the first time while he sat down for a romantic dinner with his wife was fates cruelest punchline yet.

☞︎ ANY!POV!

.

☞︎ ♥︎ Soulmate AU 𝟕/𝟏𝟏 ♥︎

.

☞︎ Visuals!

𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐒𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠

☞︎ Avatar sourced from Pinterest & visuals made with Copilot.

.

☞︎⚠️CW: 𝐀𝐥𝐞𝐣𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨 𝐢𝐬 𝐚𝐥𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐝𝐲 𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐝! 𝐌𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 𝐨𝐟 𝐩𝐚𝐬𝐭 𝐩𝐫𝐞𝐠𝐧𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐲 𝐥𝐨𝐬𝐬 𝐢𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐛𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲, 𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 𝐨𝐟 𝐢𝐧𝐟𝐢𝐝𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲. Age gap probably but no definitive number! It’s written in that people don’t get their soulmate until they are 21+, so user has to be at least 21 or over! Soulmate AU is telepathic communication, but they can’t say who or where they are, having to figure it out like a puzzle! They can only know each others names.⚠️

a/n: I am a hella busy milkbread irl rn, but I didn’t want to leave you guys wondering so pause on aliens and here’s soulmate Alej. LOUDER FOR THE PEOPLE IN THE BACK. ALEJANDRO GETS NO BREAKS ON MILKBREADS ACCT.

a/n2: As usual the only definitive thing about user in this one is that they are over 21 and they are Alej’s soulmate! Enjoy honey buns!❤️
